sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Professional Boxing and Short title
sections.body:
Wrestling Control (Amendment) Act, 2010, and shall be read as
one with the Professional Boxing and Wrestling Control Act, in Cap. 156
this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.title: The long title of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.body:
of long title
of the words “ a Zambian Professional Boxing Control Board and
a Zambia Professional Wrestling Control Board ” and the
substitution therefor of the words “ the Zambia Professional Boxing
and Wrestling Control Board. ”

sections.title: Section two of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.body:
of the definition of “ Board ” and the substitution therefor of the of section 2
following definition:
“ Board ” means the Zambia Professional Boxing and Repeal and
replacement
Wrestling Control Board established under section three.
of section 3

sections.title: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section three
sections.body: and the substitution therefor of the following section:

sections.title: There is hereby established the Zambia Professional Establishment
sections.body:
of Zambia
Boxing and Wrestling Control Board which shall be a body
Professional
corporate with perpetual succesion and a common seal, Boxing and
Wrestling
capable of suing and of being sued in its corporate name
Control
and with power, subject to the provisions of this Act, to do Board
all such acts and things as a body corporate may, by law,
do or perform.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000 each
452 No. 33 of 2010] Professional Boxing and Wrestling
Control (Amendment)
Amendment 5. Section four of the the principal Act is amended by the
section 4
deletion of the words “ in Zambia ” and the substitution therefor of
the words “ within or outside Zambia ”.
Amendment 6. Section six of the principal Act is amended in subsetion (1)—
of section 6
(a) by the deletion of the words “three years ” and the
substitution therefor of the words “ five years ”: and
(b) by the deletion of paragraph (a) and the substitution therefor
of the following paragraph:
(a) who has by oneself, directly or indirectly or through
the member’s spouse, partner or business
associate, any financial interest in boxing or
wrestling at any tournament.
Amendment 7. Section nine of the principal Act is amended in subsection
of section 9 (1) by the deletion of the proviso to paragraph (c) and the substition
therefor of the following proviso:
Provided that the Board shall not register a person as a
boxer, a wrestler, an official, a manager or a promoter unless
the Board is satisfied that the person is eighteen years of age
or older.
